ab: Madengay tu haw kisu a pacaliw tu pida i takuwan.
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: Hay isaw! A hacuwa saw ku nipicaliw nu misu?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: Mapawan kaku tu papidaan hani, caliway aca ku pida nu misu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，你的錢借我一下好嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring my money, can you lend me your money?

ab: Mahaen kaku, awaay ku nipikerid nu maku tu pida.
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: Mapawan kaku tu papidaan hani, caliway aca ku pida nu misu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢包了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring my wallet, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Aka, caay hen kisu panukas tu nicaliwan i naayaw.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: Pacaliwi kaku tu vuduy isu.
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: Hayi, keda! Kaisu tu ku mialaay.
en: B:Hooray! Get your own!

ab: Pacaliwen aca kaku tu cudad nu misu.
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: Pacaliwentu nu maku ci Nakawan.
en: B: I lent it to Nakaw.

ab: Pacaliwi kaku tu vatikar nu misu?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle?

ab: Hayi! Nika, a panukasen tu nu misu anucila.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還(給我)。
en: B: Okay, but you have to return it tomorrow.

ab: Uradan tu! caay kasicacevaren kaku, caliway hen aca ku cacevaren nu misu.
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: Ca:cay ku cacevaren nu maku, cacayat hanaw tu nu mita.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: U nipacaliwan nu misu kina cudad i takuwan inacila, ya! panukasay tu nu maku kisu.
ch: A:這是你昨天借給我的書，拿著，還給你。
en: A: Here's the book you lent me last time, take it and give it back.

ab: Anu ira hen ku mamamelawen a cudad, suwal hantu kaku.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: A hacuwa saw kaku a panukas i tisuwan tu nicaliwan a pida?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: Asiruma, anu sipida kisu itiya han tu a panukas.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: A hacuwa saw kisu a panukas tu nicaliwan a pida i takuwan?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: Cilaaw tu nu maku a panukas i tisuwan.
en: A: I will return it to you tomorrow.

ab: A hacuwa tu saw kisu a panukas tu nicaliwan a cudad i takuwan?
ch: A:你(到底)什麼時候要還我書啊?
en: B: When are you (exactly) going to return my book?

ab: Napanukasentu nu maku kisu inacila kiyami.
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: Nipacaliwan haw ni Kacaw kina sapisurit i tisuwan?
en: A: Did Kacaw lend you this pen?

ab: Hayi! Nicaliwan nu maku i ciraan anini a remiadan.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: Nicaliwan haw nu misu ci Kacawan kina sapisurit?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Kacaw?

ab: Caay, u nicakayan ni ina aku.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: Awaaytu ku cilah, caliwen ku cilah na Panay.
en: A: We're out of salt, go borrow some from Panay.

ab: Hayi, caliway tu nu maku.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: Papinukasen ci Panay tu nicaliwan nira a pida i takuwan.
en: B: Go tell Panay to pay me back.

ab: Pina saw ku nitadahan nira tu pida i tisuwan?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
